name: Blondies
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly cream the margarine with the dark brown sugar and granulated sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and beat well to combine.
3. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking powder into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually mix the sifted dry ingredients into the creamed mixture until just combined.
5. Stir in the chopped nuts and vanilla extract.
6. Spoon the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until set.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before cutting into squares.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
